_comment: Official Overwatch sub-roles (Season 1 'Reign of Talon' relaunch, Feb 2026). Each sub-role carries a gameplay passive. 'implies' lists mechanical tags the engine can fold into matchup logic. Passive values get tuned per patch - treat as a snapshot and re-check after balance updates.

initiator.passive: Staying airborne / using a movement ability grants heal-over-time.

bruiser.passive: Reduces critical damage received; gains move speed below 50% HP.

recon.passive: Detect enemies below half HP through walls after damaging them.

specialist.passive: Eliminating an enemy briefly increases reload speed.

tactician.passive: Retains excess ultimate charge after using ultimate (up to 25%).

medic.passive: Healing allies with your weapon also heals you (25%).

survivor.passive: Using a movement ability triggers passive health regen.
